title: CaveBiomeAPI
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/648382392230215702?color=208fc6&label=%20&labelColor=1b74b6&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/fTzK9SP) [![](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=ItsBlackGear&color=208fc6&labelColor=1b74b6&style=for-the-badge&logo=x&logoColor=DDE4EF)](https://twitter.com/ItsBlackGear) [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?label=&color=208fc6&labelColor=1b74b6&style=for-the-badge&logo=Patreon&logoColor=white&url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api/?username=blackgear&type=patrons)](https://patreon.com/blackgear)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
####

Requires Platform API

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires_Platform-white?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=1b74b6&color=208fc6)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/platform)
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
🚀 **CaveBiomeAPI** allows the minecraft worlds to have underground biomes in 1.16.5! **Wiki in Development** **Currently Supported Mods** * VanillaBackport (Formerly Caves & Cliffs Backport) * Darker Depths **Special Thanks To:** * [CorgiTaco](https://www.curseforge.com/members/corgi_taco/projects) * [LudoCrypt](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ludocrypt/projects) * [TelepathicGrunt](https://www.curseforge.com/members/telepathicgrunt/projects) * [Jasmine](https://www.curseforge.com/members/jasmine/projects) New system inspired on [SimpleCaveBiomes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplecavebiomes) by Lymia.
![](https://i.imgur.com/6H8YGoX.png)
[![](https://i.imgur.com/H8ftf1K.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/minecraft-servers)
